purpose: Condensed repo snapshot: architecture, contracts, and integration status. Details in CONTRACTS.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, docs/PLATFORM_STATUS.md, plans/INTEGRATION_STATUS.md.
project_summary: Backend agnostic manipulation runtime: one RoboEnv loop across MuJoCo, Gazebo, Isaac Sim, ROS2, and hardware. Tasks, sensor rigs, and policies bind via registry and YAML presets so simulator switches and sim2real paths share observation and action contracts.

implemented: RoboEnv + Robot/RobotTask; from_config, presets, multi robot MuJoCo
Backends: mujoco, gazebo, ros2_rviz, isaacsim (mock CI), real_world, dummy
SensorRig + ObsPipeline (sync, noise, color blob → obs.objects); FT, IMU, contact, RGBD
Policies: reach DSL, joint track, BC/PPO checkpoints, remote ZMQ/gRPC serve
Training: Gymnasium adapter, SubprocVecEnv, robodeploy train bc|ppo|eval
Benchmarks: manipulation_v1 harness, eval CLI, leaderboard JSON, train→eval E2E
Safety: SafetyMonitor on step and reset; workspace, slew, force, e stop guards
Sim2real: calibration CLIs, DR sweep, transfer eval (dummy tested paths)
CI: ~620 tests (not hardware); live Gazebo pick E2E; package build workflow
gaps: Teleop / IL data collection stub only
Gazebo pick CI ≥50% (target 70%); Isaac GPU parity unchecked live
Benchmark tiers 2 to 8 placeholders; real hardware eval manual

key_decisions: Layers: IBackend, ITask, IPolicy, ISensor; shared types in core/types.py
Robot + RobotTask per arm; not env wide task lists
Sensors via registry pairs; policies read Observation, not get_prop_pose()
Presets in examples/config/presets.yaml; examples/ not shipped on PyPI
Safety and bind_runtime on reset are env responsibilities
RoboBridge + seqlock for real hardware control vs inference split

milestones.summary: Registry, backends, sensor rigs, obs pipeline, examples presets
Training, benchmarks, safety, Gazebo E2E, docs, package CI (~65% of 12 goals)
PyPI release, teleop datasets, Gazebo/Isaac parity, real hardware eval automation
